## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content generation challenges and strategies for Biologica and Monograph clients.](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atlas tool struggling with consistency; Claude AI recommended as backup](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Shift focus to client delivery and specific feedback on tool issues](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Batch content creation strategy proposed to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Biologica perimenopause content cluster nearing completion; discuss next steps](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### Atlas Tool Performance Issues

  - [Multiple attempts (9+) failed to produce satisfactory content for Biologica](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Inconsistent results between Monograph and Biologica content generation](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Some improvements noted (e.g., reduced em dash usage) but still suboptimal](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Strategy: Run 5 attempts, then default to Claude AI if results unsatisfactory](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### Content Generation Workflow

  - [Use Claude AI for article generation when Atlas fails](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Apply writing guidelines and post-processing in Claude](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Run fact-checker on Claude-generated content, not necessary for Atlas output](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Focus on articulating tool misses rather than forcing Atlas to work](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### Biologica Content Strategy

  - [Perimenopause cluster nearly exhausted (2-3 weeks of content left)](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Agenda item for next call: discuss expanding to other themes or generating more perimenopause ideas](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Consider moving to menopause or other life stages for product diversification](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)

### Monograph Content Plan

  - [Matthew to complete and deliver overdue articles today](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Generate 10-15 articles in bulk to create a buffer and reduce context switching](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Aim for 1.5-2 hour editing sessions to produce multiple pieces efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

### Image Selection for Monograph

  - [Check ContentOS for previous image placement](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Mariana to confirm image insertion process and location](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### Read Time vs. Word Count

  - [Experiment with specifying read time in article directions](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Leave existing word count mentions for now, awaiting system updates](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

### Feedback and Revisions

  - [Biologica team actively commenting on articles and single ingredient page](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Review comments on Monday, mostly scientific facts and details](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Generate and edit remaining Monograph articles for immediate delivery](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Create 10-15 additional Monograph articles to build a content buffer](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Process Biologica articles through Atlas/Claude and apply fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Review Biologica team comments on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Prepare to discuss perimenopause content strategy in next Biologica call](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Await Daniel's shipment of updated content generation rules for testing](https://fathom.video/share/vkSo7yjH5VzcGtbJB2zsx1DvrF3pzTYX?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
